import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import Button from "../components/Button"; import { useCart } from "../context/CartContext"; function CartPage() { const { cartItems, subtotal, increaseQuantity, decreaseQuantity, removeFromCart, } = useCart(); if (cartItems.length === 0) { return (

Your Cart is Empty

Add products from the shop to start building your order.

Continue Shopping
); } const shipping = subtotal >= 200 ? 0 : 14.99; const total = subtotal + shipping; return (

Shopping Cart

{cartItems.map((item) => (

{item.title}

{item.category}

${item.price}

{item.quantity}
))}

Order Summary

Subtotal
${subtotal.toFixed(2)}
Shipping
{shipping === 0 ? "Free" : `$${shipping.toFixed(2)}`}
Total
${total.toFixed(2)}
); } export default CartPage;
